message:
fix(core): add bounds checks and tighten repair_engine correctness

- compute_raptorq_repair_symbols: validate source_pages.len() matches
  meta.group_size before encoding (prevents silent seed mismatch)
- detect_and_repair_page: validate target_pgno is within the group
  range before proceeding (prevents underflow/out-of-bounds panic)
- Replace dead _ => 0 match arm with let-else that returns
  Unrecoverable on unexpected RepairResult variant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
